text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I understand. Thank you for bringing this issue to
my attention. I'll reorder the supplies right away.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's one more thing. It concerns our
budget...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I just completed those documents this
morning. I'll go and retrieve them from the
student council office.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Phew... Onto the next task.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is swamped with student council work,
and this busy period is showing no signs of letting
up.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm a little worried about her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've tried telling her to get some rest on multiple
occasions, but she insists that she's too busy.
choice_data_list:
If only there was some way to take her mind off
things.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Like a change of pace? I can make that happen!
I'll arrange a surprise that'll whisk her off into a
realm of astonishment and excitement!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, how should I go about this? I'd like to hear
your input, if you've got the time.
choice_data_list: Who's someone that she'll actually listen to?
She loves flowers, right? Can we use that?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Someone she'd listen to... Nice. I think I've just
come up with a brilliant idea!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Okay, it's about time to head to the
student council office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who is it?
Yoo-hoo, Air Groove! Have you been well?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...What?! It can't be! That voice!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: M-Mother?! What are you doing here?
Oh, you know how it is.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I do! S-sorry, I just need a couple of
minutes to clean up!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, not that the room is in any way dirty—I just
want to tidy it up more!
...This vase looks natural over here, right?!

Oh, don't you worry about any of that. Just
listen—some of your friends told me that you've
been running yourself ragged recently.

That won't do at all. You've got to relax more! Go
out and have fun with your friends. You need a
change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right, I will! And the room's ready now, so we
can continue this conversation inside! Let me
open the door—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Surprise!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What?! Were you just imitating my mother's
voice?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: How dare you? What could possibly have possessed you to do something so reprehensible?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Look, I'm sorry! I was just so worried about you! I had to do something.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Worried? About me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everything I said just now when I was pretending
to be your mother—it's how I really feel.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Ahh, I see. So that's what this is all about.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
While I disapprove of your methods... I must
admit there is logic in your words.

That's right, Air Groove! Taking breaks is
absolutely crucial! How reassuring to know that
you've such caring friends.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? ...Not this again. And who is imitating my mother this time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kachak.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo, Air Groove! Your mother has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wha—M-Mother?! Is it really you?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: SURPRISE!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, this won't do. You mustn't exert yourself
so much that your friends become concerned.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I want you to come home this weekend and take
it easy. Come on, off we go! You're long overdue
for a bit of letting your hair down!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Mother?! Hold on a moment!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Flowers, huh? In that case... I might be able to use
that gadget!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Phew... It's really getting late.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Hm? Are those flower seeds on my table? I don't
recall having seeds like those...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop! Pop, pop, pop!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop, pop! Pop! Pop, pop, pop!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What is that noise?! Wh-what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh, what happened just now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter, Groove?! You seem awfully
flustered.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Fine... Hmm, how do I even explain
this?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There was a series of small explosions in our room
suddenly, and flowers started blooming all over
the place.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Hehehe, that sounds like quite the mire!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This is no laughing matter... At any rate, be sure
to stay alert—there could be other bizarre
contraptions concealed around here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Your room was filled with flowers?!
How terrible!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...What are you smirking about, dorm leader? We
have to get to the bottom of this quickly and
issue a report to—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait. You... Grrr, so that's what's going on!

text_block_list.name: Fuji & Fine
text_block_list.text: Surprise!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You had me completely fooled.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So how was the surprise? Did you enjoy it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Enjoy it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We gathered all the flowers you like, Groove!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You've been super busy lately, so we hoped some
flowers would help alleviate your stress!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Alleviate my stress, you say?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Ahh, I see... It's true that I've been overworking
myself a little.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to put all the flowers in my room into
vases... and you two are going to help. Then we
can use them to decorate the whole dorm.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, so you're going to end up working
anyway. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That Empress of ours never learns, does she?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but you're mistaken. I don't consider this
work.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Putting flowers on display is how I relax.
